name: Offer Campaign
description: Promotional creatives for discounts, launches and limited-time deals
briefInstructions: Commission premium professional background artwork for a lead-generation campaign. The image must communicate trust, organization, and modern professionalism through environment alone — NO dashboards, NO software UI, NO readable screens. Show society management professionals (CA, treasurer, committee member) in their natural work environment: a well-organized office with printed financial registers, warm lighting, modern furniture, residential complex visible outside. Technology is implied — one laptop open, screen softly blurred. The image communicates aspiration and competence, not the offer. Offer details are composited on top. Bottom 30% must be smooth and dark for headline text.

inputs.label: Offer Headline
inputs.placeholder: e.g. 20% OFF, Free Setup, Launch Price

inputs.label: Offer Description
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Annual Subscription, All Features Included

inputs.label: Call to Action
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Book Demo, Claim Now, Get Started

inputs.label: Additional Subtext
inputs.placeholder: e.g. T&C apply. For new sign-ups only.
